mapper.select: SELECT MONTH,NAME,SUM(FLOW)*8.64 AS FLOW FROM( select EXTRACT(YEAR FROM RECORD_TIME) as YEAR, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM RECORD_TIME) as MONTH, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM RECORD_TIME) BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN '1' WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM RECORD_TIME) BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '2' ELSE '3' END AS NAME, COALESCE(V, 0) AS FLOW from "TTH"."DAY_WATER_SITUATION_STATISTICS_TABLE_LZZ" where "TIME" = '今日均' AND RECORD_TIME BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} and TABLE_HEAD_ID = '73f33822cf2c48caa4302dabf769b29b' ) GROUP BY MONTH,NAME
